document_metadata.title: Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Midnight Marauder Pattern Sneaker Returns: Release Date and Where to Buy
document_metadata.first_words: HIGHLIGHTS: Is it just me or does the pattern on the Air Jordan 8–especially the 'Bugs Bunny' colorway that's on the way back–remind anyone else of the cover of the iconic A Tribe Called Quest album, Midnight Marauders? Electric Relaxation, Sucka *****, God Lives Through, Lyrics to Go yeah that was an iconic album and cover. The Air Jordan 8 silhouette is nearly as legendary–even though it's not one of my favorite retros. content_metadata.document_title_txt: Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Midnight Marauder Pattern Sneaker Returns: Release Date and Where to Buy

chunks.content_original: Unless it's a gift, I probably won't be copping the AJ8 'Bugs Bunny.' That said, the first time I see someone wearing them I'll probably say, “I see you.“ Because these are the kind of sneakers worthy of acknowledgment. Real sneakerheads and hoopers know what I mean.
chunks.content: Unless it's a gift, I probably won't be copping the AJ8 'Bugs Bunny.' That said, the first time I see someone wearing them I'll probably say, “I see you.“ Because these are the kind of sneakers worthy of acknowledgment. Real sneakerheads and hoopers know what I mean.

chunks.content_original: Originally released in 1993, the 'Bugs Bunny' earned its nickname from the beloved Looney Tunes character who appeared alongside Michael Jordan in the famous “Hare Jordan“ campaign. Designed by Tinker Hatfield, the silhouette features distinctive cross-straps embroidered with MJ's number 23, a chenille tongue patch, and that unmistakable brush stroke pattern across the midsole. This 2025 retro marks the sneaker's first return since 2013, following previous releases in 2003 and 2008. The white leather upper with suede collar remains faithful to the original, complemented by striking red and black accents that mirror the Chicago Bulls palette. As part of Jordan Brand's 40th anniversary celebration, the 'Bugs Bunny' arrives December 20, 2025 in full family sizing. Pairs will be available at Nike SNKRS, DTLR, JD Sports, and select Jordan Brand retailers for $210.

This 2025 retro marks the sneaker's first return since 2013, following previous releases in 2003 and 2008. The white leather upper with suede collar remains faithful to the original, complemented by striking red and black accents that mirror the Chicago Bulls palette. As part of Jordan Brand's 40th anniversary celebration, the 'Bugs Bunny' arrives December 20, 2025 in full family sizing. Pairs will be available at Nike SNKRS, DTLR, JD Sports, and select Jordan Brand retailers for $210.

chunks.content_original: The iconic Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' returns for the first time since 2013 as part of the Jordan Brand 40th anniversary celebration. Tinker Hatfield's distinctive cross-strap design and chenille tongue patch define this classic Bulls-inspired colorway. Full family sizing arrives just before Christmas with availability across major retailers. Is it just me or does the pattern on the Air Jordan 8–especially the 'Bugs Bunny' colorway that's on the way back–remind anyone else of the cover of the iconic A Tribe Called Quest album, Midnight Marauders? Electric Relaxation, Sucka *****, God Lives Through, Lyrics to Go yeah that was an iconic album and cover. The Air Jordan 8 silhouette is nearly as legendary–even though it's not one of my favorite retros. Still, there is something cool about the 'Bugs Bunny' and that's likely why Jordan Brand has it coming back just in time for Christmas this year. Let's talk sneakers.

Sneakers Kicks Kids Shoe Deals Air Jordan Nike Deals Jordan Retro Women's Shoe Deals Air Jordan Release Dates Men's Shoe Deals Style Wed, 26 Nov 2025 06:25:10 GMT https://athlonsports.com/style/kicks/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-release-date-and-where-to-buy Brian Mazique 2025-11-26T06:25:10Z HIGHLIGHTS:

  • Tinker Hatfield's distinctive cross-strap design and chenille tongue patch define this classic Bulls-inspired colorway
  • Full family sizing arrives just before Christmas with availability across major retailers

Is it just me or does the pattern on the Air Jordan 8–especially the 'Bugs Bunny' colorway that's on the way back–remind anyone else of the cover of the iconic A Tribe Called Quest album, Midnight Marauders? Electric Relaxation, Sucka *****, God Lives Through, Lyrics to Go yeah that was an iconic album and cover.

The Air Jordan 8 silhouette is nearly as legendary–even though it's not one of my favorite retros. Still, there is something cool about the 'Bugs Bunny' and that's likely why Jordan Brand has it coming back just in time for Christmas this year. Let's talk sneakers.

Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Details

  • Shoe Name: Air Jordan 8 Retro 'Bugs Bunny'
  • Official Colorway: White/Black-True Red
  • Style Code: 305381-100
  • Release Date: December 20, 2025
  • Price: $210
  • Where to Buy: SNKRS

Additional photos of the Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' can be viewed on Just Fresh Kicks.

Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Deep Dive

Originally released in 1993, the 'Bugs Bunny' earned its nickname from the beloved Looney Tunes character who appeared alongside Michael Jordan in the famous "Hare Jordan" campaign. Designed by Tinker Hatfield, the silhouette features distinctive cross-straps embroidered with MJ's number 23, a chenille tongue patch, and that unmistakable brush stroke pattern across the midsole.

This 2025 retro marks the sneaker's first return since 2013, following previous releases in 2003 and 2008. The white leather upper with suede collar remains faithful to the original, complemented by striking red and black accents that mirror the Chicago Bulls palette.

As part of Jordan Brand's 40th anniversary celebration, the 'Bugs Bunny' arrives December 20, 2025 in full family sizing. Pairs will be available at Nike SNKRS, DTLR, JD Sports, and select Jordan Brand retailers for $210.

Worth the Acknowledgment

Unless it's a gift, I probably won't be copping the AJ8 'Bugs Bunny.' That said, the first time I see someone wearing them I'll probably say, "I see you." Because these are the kind of sneakers worthy of acknowledgment. Real sneakerheads and hoopers know what I mean.

markdown_content:
**HIGHLIGHTS:**

- The iconic Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' returns for the first time since 2013 as part of the Jordan Brand 40th anniversary celebration
- Tinker Hatfield's distinctive cross-strap design and chenille tongue patch define this classic Bulls-inspired colorway
- Full family sizing arrives just before Christmas with availability across major retailers

Is it just me or does the pattern on the Air Jordan 8–especially the 'Bugs Bunny' colorway that's on the way back–remind anyone else of the cover of the iconic [A Tribe Called Quest](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Midnight_Marauders) album, Midnight Marauders? Electric Relaxation, Sucka \*\*\*\*\*, God Lives Through, Lyrics to Go yeah that was an iconic album and cover.

The Air Jordan 8 silhouette is nearly as legendary–even though it's not one of my favorite retros. Still, there is something cool about the 'Bugs Bunny' and that's likely why Jordan Brand has it coming back just in time for Christmas this year. [Let's talk sneakers](https://athlonsports.com/author/brian-mazique).

## **Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Details**

![](https://athlonsports.com/.image/c_fit%2Ch_800%2Cw_1200/MjY6MDAwMDAwMDAwNzA2NDU5/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny.png)
Air Jordan 8 Bugs Bunny

Houseofheat

- **Shoe Name:** Air Jordan 8 Retro 'Bugs Bunny'
- **Official Colorway:** White/Black-True Red
- **Style Code:** 305381-100
- **Release Date:** December 20, 2025
- **Price:** $210
- **Where to Buy:** SNKRS

Additional photos of the Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' can be viewed on Just Fresh Kicks.

> The Air Jordan 8 “Bugs Bunny” Returns December 20th <https://t.co/F67dmWrp5J> [pic.twitter.com/MMVGzQ3gHL](https://t.co/MMVGzQ3gHL)
>
> — JustFreshKicks (@JustFreshKicks) [November 25, 2025](https://twitter.com/JustFreshKicks/status/1993113591768080827?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw)

**[Related: Air Jordan Release Calendar - November 2025](https://athlonsports.com/style/kicks/air-jordan-release-calendar-november-2025)**

## **Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Deep Dive**

[Originally released in 1993](https://sneakerbardetroit.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025/), the 'Bugs Bunny' earned its nickname from the beloved Looney Tunes character who appeared alongside Michael Jordan in the famous "Hare Jordan" campaign. [Designed by Tinker Hatfield](https://www.kicksonfire.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025), the silhouette features distinctive cross-straps embroidered with MJ's number 23, a chenille tongue patch, and that unmistakable brush stroke pattern across the midsole.

This 2025 retro marks the sneaker's [first return since 2013](https://wwd.com/footwear-news/sneaker-news/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-release-date-305381-100-001-1238265373/), following previous releases in 2003 and 2008. The white leather upper with suede collar remains faithful to the original, complemented by striking red and black accents that mirror the [Chicago Bulls](https://athlonsports.com/nba/chicago-bulls) palette.

As part of Jordan Brand's [40th anniversary celebration](https://justfreshkicks.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny/), the 'Bugs Bunny' arrives December 20, 2025 in full family sizing. [Pairs will be available](https://houseofheat.co/jordan/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025) at Nike SNKRS, DTLR, JD Sports, and select Jordan Brand retailers for $210.

## **Worth the Acknowledgment**

Unless it's a gift, I probably won't be copping the AJ8 'Bugs Bunny.' That said, the first time I see someone wearing them I'll probably say, "I see you." Because these are the kind of [sneakers](https://athlonsports.com/style/kicks) worthy of acknowledgment. Real sneakerheads and hoopers know what I mean.

## **Air Jordan 8 'Bugs Bunny' Deep Dive**

[Originally released in 1993](https://sneakerbardetroit.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025/), the 'Bugs Bunny' earned its nickname from the beloved Looney Tunes character who appeared alongside Michael Jordan in the famous "Hare Jordan" campaign. [Designed by Tinker Hatfield](https://www.kicksonfire.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025), the silhouette features distinctive cross-straps embroidered with MJ's number 23, a chenille tongue patch, and that unmistakable brush stroke pattern across the midsole.

This 2025 retro marks the sneaker's [first return since 2013](https://wwd.com/footwear-news/sneaker-news/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-release-date-305381-100-001-1238265373/), following previous releases in 2003 and 2008. The white leather upper with suede collar remains faithful to the original, complemented by striking red and black accents that mirror the [Chicago Bulls](https://athlonsports.com/nba/chicago-bulls) palette.

As part of Jordan Brand's [40th anniversary celebration](https://justfreshkicks.com/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny/), the 'Bugs Bunny' arrives December 20, 2025 in full family sizing. [Pairs will be available](https://houseofheat.co/jordan/air-jordan-8-bugs-bunny-2025) at Nike SNKRS, DTLR, JD Sports, and select Jordan Brand retailers for $210.

## **Worth the Acknowledgment**

Unless it's a gift, I probably won't be copping the AJ8 'Bugs Bunny.' That said, the first time I see someone wearing them I'll probably say, "I see you." Because these are the kind of [sneakers](https://athlonsports.com/style/kicks) worthy of acknowledgment. Real sneakerheads and hoopers know what I mean.
